+                Ingredients = "Avocados\nLime juice\nRed onion\nCilantro\nJalapeño\nTomato\nSalt\nGarlic",
+                Steps = "1. Halve and pit the avocados, scoop into a bowl.\n2. Mash with a fork to desired consistency.\n3. Stir in diced onion, tomato, jalapeño, and cilantro.\n4. Add lime juice, garlic, and salt to taste.\n5. Serve immediately with tortilla chips.",
+                Ratings = [4, 5, 4]
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 8,
+                Title = "Miso Soup",
+                Category = "Japanese",
+                Ingredients = "Dashi stock\nMiso paste\nTofu\nWakame seaweed\nGreen onions",
+                Steps = "1. Bring dashi stock to a gentle simmer.\n2. Dissolve miso paste into the stock (do not boil).\n3. Add cubed tofu and rehydrated wakame.\n4. Heat through for 2 minutes.\n5. Serve garnished with sliced green onions.",
+                Ratings = [4, 4, 3, 4]
+            }
+        ];
+        _nextId = 9;
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories()
+    {
+        return _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category)
+    {
+        return _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+    }
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id)
+    {
+        return _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+    }
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int rating)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && rating is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.Ratings.Add(rating);
+        }
+    }
+
+    public Recipe AddRecipe(string title, string category, string ingredients, string steps)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = title,
+            Category = category,
+            Ingredients = ingredients,
+            Steps = steps
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+        return recipe;
+    }
+}
+

data.content:
Clean build with zero warnings. Here's what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeCommunity` — a Blazor Web App using per-component render modes.

**Architecture — static SSR by default, interactive only where needed:**
- **Homepage** (`/`) — static SSR, displays recipe categories with counts
- **Category page** (`/category/{name}`) — static SSR, lists recipes with star ratings
- **Recipe detail** (`/recipe/{id}`) — static SSR for content, with an **Interactive Server** `StarRating` component for the clickable 1–5 star widget
- **Submit Recipe** (`/submit`) — **Interactive Server** page with a validated form (title, category, ingredients, steps)

**Key files:**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/Recipe.cs` | Recipe data model |
| `Services/RecipeService.cs` | In-memory recipe store (singleton), seeded with 8 recipes across 6 categories |
| `Pages/StarRating.razor` | Interactive star-rating widget (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`) |
| `Pages/SubmitRecipe.razor` | Interactive form with `DataAnnotationsValidator` |

Run with: `cd RecipeCommunity && dotnet run`
